title: Welcome to Claw3D
description: A guided tour through Claw3D — the 3D workspace and visualization layer for AI agents powered by OpenClaw. Explore the real architecture: Next.js frontend, Phaser-powered 3D office, agent management, gateway proxy, and more.
prerequisites: Basic understanding of AI agents and automation
Familiarity with Next.js, React, and TypeScript

steps.title: Welcome to Claw3D
steps.description:
Claw3D is an open-source 3D workspace where AI agents collaborate visually. Agents review code, run tests, and execute tasks inside a shared 3D office environment — think of it as a virtual office for your AI team.

The project is a Next.js application with a Phaser-based 3D rendering engine, a WebSocket gateway proxy, and a rich agent management system. OpenClaw provides the intelligence underneath.

interactiveActions.description: Click on README.md to see the full project overview

steps.title: Next.js Application Shell
steps.description:
Built on Next.js App Router. Key routes:

• page.tsx / layout.tsx — Home screen and root layout

• office/ — The 3D workspace

• agents/ — Fleet management and settings

• api/ — Server-side routes for gateway, office, and studio

interactiveActions.description: Click on page.tsx to see the home screen

steps.title: Agent Management System
steps.description:
The heart of Claw3D — managing the full agent lifecycle:

• components/ — Chat, creation, inspection, skills, and fleet sidebar

• approvals/ — Execution approval workflows with control loops and pause policies

• operations/ & state/ — Runtime operations and state management

• hooks/ & creation/ — React hooks and agent provisioning

interactiveActions.description: Hover over the approvals directory to see the execution approval workflows

steps.title: The 3D Office
steps.description:
A Phaser-powered 3D office where agents sit at desks and collaborate:

• phaser/ — Rendering engine with scenes, objects, overlays, and navigation

• components/ — UI panels for analytics, inbox, playbooks, skills marketplace

• retro-office/ — Retro-themed variant with furniture geometry and desk routes

3D furniture models (GLB) live in public/office-assets/.

interactiveActions.description: Hover over the phaser directory to see the 3D rendering system

steps.title: Gateway Proxy & Server
steps.description:
The browser never talks directly to the OpenClaw Gateway — everything flows through the Studio proxy:

• server/ — Express server with WebSocket forwarding, auth gate, and network policy

• src/lib/gateway/ — Client-side gateway abstraction and error handling

• src/app/api/gateway/ — API routes for agent-state, media, and skills

interactiveActions.description: Click on gateway-proxy.js to see the WebSocket proxy

steps.title: Shared Libraries & Utilities
steps.description:
Shared infrastructure in src/lib/ that connects the features:

• office/ — State management, presence, standups, and event triggers

• gateway/ — Gateway client and OpenClaw integration

• security/ — Permission sandboxing

• skills/, cron/, agents/ — Skill system, scheduling, and avatars

interactiveActions.description: Hover over the office library to see state management and event systems

steps.title: Testing & Developer Tooling
steps.description:
Multi-layer testing and dev tooling:

• tests/unit/ — Vitest unit tests

• tests/e2e/ — Playwright end-to-end tests

• scripts/ — Cleanup, smoke testing, and gateway sync helpers

• .env.example — Environment variable template for local setup

interactiveActions.description: Click on .env.example to see the required environment variables

steps.title: What's Next
steps.description:
You've explored the full Claw3D codebase! Here's where to go from here:

• README.md — Quick start guide and project overview
• ARCHITECTURE.md — System boundaries and data flow
• ROADMAP.md — Current priorities and good first contributions
• CONTRIBUTING.md — Local setup and PR expectations
• CODE_DOCUMENTATION.md — Detailed code-level documentation
• TUTORIAL.md — Step-by-step walkthrough

The project is early-stage and actively evolving. Check GitHub Issues for current work. Welcome to the team!

interactiveActions.description: Explore the full codebase on your own
